phase_progress: C-005d.1 + C-005d.2 CODE DONE on branch feat/memory-channels-to-store (PR #88), rebased onto main after upstream merge #87. Remaining: C-005d.3 — configure_sidecar_channel stores the sidecar_channels array as a trusted-section override; the channel-secrets env file write stays unchanged; preserve the include-shadow guard. No secret VALUE may enter the store.

next_action.description: Implement C-005d.3: configure_sidecar_channel persists the sidecar_channels structure to the DB config store under surreal-backend (channel-secrets env file untouched; include-shadow guard preserved). Then push to PR #88 and the C-005d cluster is complete.
